calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nguyen (Petitioner in Pro Per).

The Court noted that the notice issue is satisfied and that the hospital record supports the baby's birth. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Continued To Jan-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nguyen in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it does not have any information/facts to support the petition to establish that the Son was born on July 11, 2009. Mr. Nguyen stated that he has medical records from the hospital, explained his marital status and that the Mother of the child is currently incarcerated, and stated that she (Mother) did not get notice of the petition. Mr. Nguyen also stated that he waited too long to have the birth certificate issued and that he is trying to enroll his Son in pre-school. Mr. Nguyen was directed to speak with the Probate Examiner. The Court reviewed the patient medical records of Jacqulyn Elizabeth Nguyen from Saint Francis Memorial Hospital presented by the petitioner, which records confirmed that the baby boy was delivered around 7:04 a.m. on 7/11/09, and then mother and baby were transferred to CPMC sometime after 7:30 a.m. Notice must be given to the child's mother. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth was continued to January 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clarke. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Continued To Dec-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nguyen in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Mr. Nguyen that form VS-108 (proposed order) is required. Mr. Nguyen stated that his Son was born at St. Francis Memorial Hosptial in San Francisco on an emergency basis, that St. Francis does not usually do live births, that the Mother and Baby were transferred to Catholic Health Care West and that the birth certificate did transfer over. The Court stated that it could not determine fact, time and place of birth based on the facts that were stated in the petition. The Petition to Establish Fact, Time and Place of Birth was continued to December 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Nguyen to complete form VS-108 and provide more information.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Continued To Dec-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
